title: Fix Undefined Variable $objectLabel Error in ScorecardsController
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the dictionary to load without errors, so that I can view my data without encountering application crashes.
description: A customer (NVIDIA - mrowe@nvidia.com) encountered an "Undefined variable $objectLabel" error in `ScorecardsController.php` on line 91 when accessing the application. The variable was not initialized before use in certain code paths.
acceptance_criteria: No undefined variable errors on the dictionary/scorecards page
NVIDIA customer can access the application without errors
middleware_changes: Fixed undefined $objectLabel variable in ScorecardsController.php line 91.
comment_summary: Waqar identified and fixed the undefined variable on dev.
